name: Tank War Machines
description: Incredibly dynamic and fun multiplayer game. Build your tank from dozens of parts, play with your friends &amp; dominate the arena - 3 vs 3 PVP action. Try different tactics and win. Choose a tank and join the battle! Tanks A Lot! features four distinct game modes: - shoot your way in a classic, adrenaline-filled Deathmatch - fight for resources in Brawl - be the last man standing in Battle Royale - play football in Tank-O-Ball, but with tanks!
instructions: The game level is to enter the battlefield operate your own tank to attack the enemy target the enemy target is a moving target For tanks and airplanes players need to pay attention to the different angles of attack and the different damage caused by
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, airplane, Arcade, Battle, Gun, Tank, Tanks, War, weapons
